description: AST patterns for supply-chain. Most supply-chain content is JSON/YAML; ast-grep adds value in JS/Python build scripts where script-defined hooks live.

patterns.description: execSync in install hook script — investigate the command
patterns.false_positive_notes: Check whether the command shells out to download / install.
Rare; usually means the package does something at install time.

patterns.description: urlopen call — if seen in setup.py / build_*.py is a fetch-at-install red flag
patterns.false_positive_notes: Concern depends on file (setup.py / postinstall vs library code).

patterns.description: subprocess call — if in build_*.py / setup.py, investigate
